## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Issue/template/support files only

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested or previewed the change locally if applicable.
- [ ] I updated docs if needed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets or private files.
- [ ] I checked that the change matches https://failpack.dev/docs.
- [ ] I understand this repository is not published under an open-source license.
